venues.name: Hyatt Ziva & Zilara Cap Cana
venues.notes: Two connected resorts sharing wedding team. Contact: Jouberkys Mercedes (Wedding Manager) — Jouberkys.mercedes@hyatt.com | Office: +1 (809) 469-7090 ext. 7318 | Toll-free: 1 (833) 577-0935. Outdoor events end by 11pm. Outside photography/video vendors NOT allowed. Other outside vendors: $1,500/service fee. Thu–Sun weddings require an upgraded package.

packages.name: Just the Two of You
includes: Pre-planning & on-site services of a professional wedding specialist
Complimentary online wedding registry & wedding website
Wedding location
Symbolic marriage ceremony & certificate — bilingual secular officiant
Bouquets and/or boutonnieres for the couple (white roses or tropical flowers)
Sparkling wine toast after the ceremony for the couple
Signature wedding cake
Special room decoration with petals and complimentary wine
Late check-out for the couple up to 3pm (subject to availability)
COMPLIMENTARY with 7+ nights in Club Ocean View Junior Suite or higher
Available Mon–Wed only (10am–2pm) — must be booked within 6 months of wedding date
Package for 2 pax ONLY — no additional guests

packages.name: Intimate Elegance
includes: Pre-planning & on-site services of a professional wedding specialist
Complimentary online wedding registry & website
Wedding location
Symbolic marriage ceremony & certificate — bilingual secular officiant
Ceremony table with white linen and folding white chairs for guests
Basic sound system for the ceremony
Bouquets and/or boutonnieres for the couple (white roses or tropical flowers)
Sparkling wine toast after the ceremony
Signature wedding cake
Special room decoration with petals and complimentary wine
Romantic dinner for the wedding couple
Massage for the wedding couple
Late check-out for the couple up to 3pm (subject to availability)
COMPLIMENTARY with 25+ room nights (3-night min/room) in Club Ocean View Junior Suite or higher
Available Mon–Wed only (10am–2pm) — must book within 6 months of date
Extra adult: $55 | Extra child (3–12): $40

packages.name: Lavish & Opulent
includes: Pre-planning & on-site services of a professional wedding coordinator
Complimentary online bridal registry & wedding website
Wedding location
Symbolic marriage ceremony & certificate — bilingual officiant
Ceremony table with white linen and folding wedding chairs for guests
Fresh floral centerpiece for the altar (white roses or tropical flowers)
Bouquets and/or boutonnieres for the couple (white roses or tropical flowers)
One (1) boutonniere and one (1) corsage for the wedding party
Basic sound system for the ceremony
Sparkling wine toast after the ceremony
Signature wedding cake
Romantic dinner for the wedding couple
Private 1-hour cocktail party — open bar & hors d'oeuvres, standard setup
Private 3-hour wedding reception — buffet or plated dinner*, open bar, standard setup
Special turndown service on the wedding night
Sparkling wine and romantic dessert delivered to couple's room the night of the wedding
Hair-styling and makeup for one (1) member of the couple
Manicure and pedicure for one (1) member of the couple
15% discount on spa services for the wedding couple
10% discount on spa services for the wedding guests
25-minute massage for the wedding couple
Late check-out for the couple up to 3pm (subject to availability)
One (1) complimentary room night on 1st anniversary (min 4-night stay required)
Mon–Wed all day / Thu–Sun before 4pm: $7,129 | Thu–Sun after 4pm: $7,665
Booking deposit: $1,000 non-refundable
Extra adult: $140 | Extra child (3–12): $85

packages.name: Luxury Package
includes: Complimentary online registry, website & on-site services
VIP status for the wedding couple
Tropical floral arrangement, bottle of champagne & fruit basket in couple's room upon arrival
Complimentary bathrobes & slippers for the couple during their stay
Pressing of the couple's wedding attire
Hair-styling and makeup for one (1) member of the couple
Manicure and pedicure for one (1) member of the couple
Symbolic marriage ceremony & certificate — secular and bilingual officiant
Decorated beach location or ocean front gazebo
Ceremony table with white linen and white folding chairs
Fresh floral centerpiece for the altar (white roses or tropical flowers)
Bouquets and/or boutonnieres for the couple
Two (2) mini bouquets, three (3) boutonnieres, two (2) corsages for bridal party
Basic sound system for the ceremony
Professional photographer during the ceremony (50 digital photos included)
Video services during the ceremony
Sparkling wine toast after the ceremony
Signature wedding cake with three (3) floral decorations
Private 1-hour cocktail party — open bar & hors d'oeuvres, standard setup
Solo musician (live music) — 1 set during cocktail hour
Private 3-hour wedding reception — 3-course meal, open bar, standard setup
Personalized menu card per table for the reception
Four (4) basic centerpieces for reception tables (white roses or tropical flowers)
DJ and MC service for 3 hours (dance floor not included)
Room decoration with flower petals and complimentary wine the night of the wedding
Honeymoon breakfast in bed the morning after the ceremony
50-minute massage for the wedding couple
Private romantic dinner on the beach for the wedding couple
15% discount on spa services for the wedding couple
10% discount on spa services for the wedding guests
Late checkout until 6:00pm (subject to availability)
Mon–Wed all day / Thu–Sun before 4pm: $22,150 | Thu–Sun after 4pm: $22,749
Booking deposit: $2,000 non-refundable
Extra adult: $159 | Extra child (3–12): $89

addons.name: Zilara Beach Gazebo
addons.description: Up to 120 pax. Ceremony location. Flowers & décor at additional cost. Hyatt Zilara side.

addons.name: Ziva Beach Gazebo
addons.description: Up to 150 pax. Ceremony location. Flowers & décor at additional cost. Hyatt Ziva side.

addons.name: Beach Area
addons.description: Up to 600 pax. Ceremony, cocktail & reception. Buffet dinner required outdoors. Flowers & décor extra.

addons.name: Rooftop Terrace Location Fee
addons.description: Hyatt Ziva only. 100 pax ceremony, 80 pax cocktail/reception, 100 pax dinner. Buffet required. Cannot combine with Zilara Gazebo.

addons.name: Waves Lawn
addons.description: Adults only. Up to 110 pax. Hyatt Zilara. Buffet required. Flowers & décor extra.

addons.name: Santiago Lawn
addons.description: Adults only. Up to 40 pax. Hyatt Zilara. Buffet required. Flowers & décor extra.

addons.name: Legal / Civil Ceremony Fee
addons.description: Government surcharge for legal/civil ceremonies (2027). Documents must be apostilled & translated. Certificate delivery up to 15 weeks.

addons.name: Outside Vendor Fee (per service)
addons.description: Per outside vendor service (décor, DJ, AV, etc.). Photography & video outside vendors NOT permitted. Covers 1 person for 1 day.

addons.name: Extra Adult Guest — Intimate Elegance
addons.description: Per additional adult beyond 12 included in Intimate Elegance package.

addons.name: Extra Child (3–12) — Intimate Elegance
addons.description: Per additional child (age 3–12) beyond 12 included in Intimate Elegance package.

addons.name: Extra Adult Guest — Lavish & Opulent
addons.description: Per additional adult beyond 22 included in Lavish & Opulent package.

addons.name: Extra Child (3–12) — Lavish & Opulent
addons.description: Per additional child (age 3–12) beyond 22 included in Lavish & Opulent package.

addons.name: Extra Adult Guest — Luxury
addons.description: Per additional adult beyond 40 included in Luxury package.

addons.name: Extra Child (3–12) — Luxury
addons.description: Per additional child (age 3–12) beyond 40 included in Luxury package.

addons.name: Thu–Sun After 4pm Surcharge — Lavish & Opulent
addons.description: Upgrade from $7,129 to $7,665 for Thursday–Sunday weddings after 4pm.

addons.name: Thu–Sun After 4pm Surcharge — Luxury
addons.description: Upgrade from $22,150 to $22,749 for Thursday–Sunday weddings after 4pm.
